issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as authentication failures or missing API specs.

scenarios.name: Add ZAP scan to every pull request
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly picks the non-destructive zap-baseline.py via zaproxy/action-baseline with High-only fail threshold and HTML/JSON reports, while baseline reaches for an active scan that risks breaking PRs.

scenarios.name: Pre-launch staging audit of an SPA with REST API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines zap-full-scan.py with authenticated session, Ajax Spider for the SPA, and zap-api-scan.py against the OpenAPI spec, while baseline runs a single unauthenticated active scan and misses login-gated endpoints.
